subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Ocean, in the form of a man, walketh and counselleth the servants with that which shall profit them in the worlds of their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان البحر علی صوره الانسان یمشی و یوصی العباد بما ینفعهم فی عوالم ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as sun
